revision.text: <includeonly>{{main other|{{#if:{{{1|}}}||[[Category:Articles for merging with no partner]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --></noinclude>

<includeonly>{{main other|{{#if:{{{1|}}}||[[Category:Articles for merging with no partner]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{main other|{{#if:{{{1|}}}||[[Category:Articles for merging with no partner]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --></noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <includeonly>{{main other|{{#if:{{{1|}}}||[[Category:Articles for merging with no partner]]}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --></noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{main other|{{#if:{{{1|}}}||}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata, thank you! --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Articles for merging with no partner]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
